task.title: Inspecting qdiscs of a network interface using the tc utility

context.p: By default, Red Hat Enterprise Linux systems use fq_codel qdisc. You can inspect the qdisc counters using the tc utility.

info.codeblock:
# tc -s qdisc show dev enp0s1
qdisc fq_codel 0: root refcnt 2 limit 10240p flows 1024 quantum 1514 target 5.0ms interval 100.0ms memory_limit 32Mb ecn Sent 1008193 bytes 5559 pkt (dropped 233, overlimits 55 requeues 77) backlog 0b 0p requeues 0

li.p: dropped - the number of times a packet is dropped because all queues are full
overlimits - the number of times the configured link capacity is filled
